mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO hr_salary_batch_item (batch_id, employee_id, base_salary, allowance, performance_bonus, overtime_pay, late_deduction, leave_deduction, social_insurance, pension_insurance, medical_insurance, unemployment_insurance, housing_fund, income_tax, gross_salary, deduction_total, net_salary, warning_level, warning_reason, create_time, update_time) VALUES
(#{item.batchId}, #{item.employeeId}, #{item.baseSalary}, #{item.allowance}, #{item.performanceBonus}, #{item.overtimePay}, #{item.lateDeduction}, #{item.leaveDeduction}, #{item.socialInsurance}, #{item.pensionInsurance}, #{item.medicalInsurance}, #{item.unemploymentInsurance}, #{item.housingFund}, #{item.incomeTax}, #{item.grossSalary}, #{item.deductionTotal}, #{item.netSalary}, #{item.warningLevel}, #{item.warningReason}, #{item.createTime}, #{item.updateTime})
